title: hieracium wilczekianum subsp. trigonolepium
intro: Hieracium wilczekianum subsp. trigonolepium, also known as the Trigonolepium Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium wilczekianum subsp. trigonolepium include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
